comment: Bbox manifest for the 31 u2 questions whose stems reference a figure but had no image stored. Bboxes are normalized [x0,y0,x1,y1] of WORKBOOK 1 FULL (1).pdf pages, top-left origin. Estimated from 150-DPI renders.

entries.alt: Block W on horizontal surface, force F at angle theta above the horizontal
entries.caption: Block pulled by F at angle

entries.alt: Hook supporting a uniform rope of weight 50 N with a 100 N box hanging from the rope's lower end
entries.caption: Rope hanging from hook with box

entries.alt: Symmetric massless string supporting weight W from both sides at angle to the horizontal
entries.caption: Object W suspended from V-shaped string

entries.alt: Block of mass 3m on a frictionless horizontal table connected over a pulley at the table edge to a hanging block of mass m
entries.caption: Two-block frictionless table-and-pulley setup

entries.alt: Inclined plane 5 m long at 37° with a block of weight 20 N on the surface
entries.caption: Block on 37° incline

entries.alt: Box of weight 30 N hanging vertically from a rope
entries.caption: Block hanging from a rope, Weight = 30 N

entries.alt: Cart of mass 10 kg on a level surface with a 30 N force at 60° above horizontal and a separate 10 N horizontal force
entries.caption: Cart with 30 N at 60° and 10 N forces

entries.alt: Speed-versus-time parabola opening upward from the origin
entries.caption: Parabolic v vs t graph

entries.alt: Ball moving horizontally with velocity v_i and a smaller vertical velocity v_y after being struck by a stick
entries.caption: Ball before-and-after stick strike

entries.alt: Two parallel massless springs of constants k1 and k2 hung from a horizontal support with a 12 N block hanging below
entries.caption: Two-spring parallel hanging weight

entries.alt: Parabolic projectile trajectory with point Q at the highest position
entries.caption: Projectile parabolic path with Q at apex

entries.alt: Block of mass m on a rough horizontal surface pulled by a force F at an angle above horizontal
entries.caption: Block pulled by F at an angle on rough surface

entries.alt: Three blocks of masses 3m, 2m, m connected in a row by strings A, B, C and pulled along a horizontal surface
entries.caption: Three blocks connected by strings A, B, C

entries.alt: Force-vs-time graph for a 3 kg block initially at rest on a frictionless horizontal surface
entries.caption: Force-vs-time graph for the block

entries.alt: Student pulling a wooden box at constant speed across a rough horizontal floor by a force P inclined above horizontal
entries.caption: Student dragging box with force P

entries.alt: 10.0 kg box sliding right along a floor with a 10 N horizontal force applied
entries.caption: 10 kg box with 10 N force

entries.alt: Four diagrams (A)(B)(C)(D) of strings holding equal masses in different configurations
entries.caption: Four string-and-mass configurations

entries.alt: Wooden box pulled across a horizontal steel plate; comparison of frictional behaviour on different surfaces
entries.caption: Box on steel plate

entries.alt: Graph of mass of rubber stoppers versus their resulting weight
entries.caption: Mass-vs-weight graph for rubber stoppers

entries.alt: Mass m1 sliding on a frictionless horizontal surface connected by a cord over a pulley to mass m2 on an inclined plane
entries.caption: Two masses, one sliding and one on incline

entries.alt: Small box of mass m placed on top of a larger box of mass 2m with a horizontal force F applied to the larger box
entries.caption: Stacked boxes with applied force F

entries.alt: 6.0 kg block held against a vertical wall by a 100 N horizontal force
entries.caption: Block pushed against wall

entries.alt: Homeowner pushing a lawn mower at constant speed over horizontal grass with force P along the handle
entries.caption: Pushing a lawn mower

entries.alt: Two identical blocks of weight W stacked on top of each other on a horizontal surface
entries.caption: Stacked identical blocks

entries.alt: Block of mass m held on an inclined plane by a force F directed up the slope
entries.caption: Force F holding block on incline

entries.alt: Three masses arranged with a large block on a surface and two blocks connected by a string over a pulley
entries.caption: Three-mass pulley diagram

entries.alt: Four diagrams (A)(B)(C)(D) each showing two weights connected by a massless string over a massless frictionless pulley
entries.caption: Four pulley configurations

entries.alt: Atwood machine: frictionless pulley with two boxes m and 2m attached to opposite ends of a string
entries.caption: Atwood machine with 2m and m

entries.alt: Block 1 stacked on top of Block 2; Block 2 connected by a light cord to Block 3 which is pulled along a frictionless surface by force F
entries.caption: Stacked blocks pulled by force F

entries.alt: 5.0 kg monkey hanging at rest from two 10 m vines A and B, making 30° and 60° with the horizontal respectively, with a trig values reference table to the right
entries.caption: Monkey suspended from two vines, with sin/cos/tan reference

entries.alt: Three blocks m3, m2, m1 in a row on a rough horizontal surface, pulled at constant velocity by a force F applied to the rightmost block
entries.caption: Three blocks sliding at constant velocity
